title: Brevo eCommerce Order
description: Represents an eCommerce order synced to the Brevo platform for revenue attribution, purchase behavior tracking, and automated marketing workflows.

id.description: Unique identifier of the order from the merchant's system.

email.description: Email address of the customer who placed the order.

status.description: Current status of the order in the fulfillment workflow.

amount.description: Total order amount including shipping, tax, and item prices.

products.description: List of products included in the order.

createdAt.description: UTC date-time when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: UTC date-time when the order was last updated.

coupons.description: Coupon codes applied to the order.

OrderProduct.description: Represents a product line item within an eCommerce order.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product ordered.

price.description: Unit price of the product at the time of the order.

variantId.description: Variant identifier if the product has size, color, or other variants.

Product.description: Represents a product in the Brevo eCommerce catalog.

url.description: URL of the product page on the merchant's website.

sku.description: Stock keeping unit identifier for inventory tracking.

categories.description: IDs of categories the product belongs to.

metaInfo.description: Additional metadata about the product as key-value pairs.

Category.description: Represents a product category in the Brevo eCommerce catalog.

url.description: URL of the category page on the merchant's website.
